MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mahendra Arvind dba California Hotel is present.
Attorney Michael Heath appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nicholas David is present.
Attorney Darren S. Teshima representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Gutierrez, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle. The trial date of NOV-7-2011 remains.
